whatThisToolHelps: What this tool helps you understand
whatThisToolHelpsDesc: A quick estimate or readiness view to help you take a better business decision.
whyWeAskDesc: The inputs help us translate your current business reality into a practical benchmark, not a generic score.
howToAnswerDesc: Use your latest working numbers or the closest realistic estimate. If you do not know an exact value, enter the most practical current assumption.
importantNoteDesc: This tool gives directional guidance, not an audit. Use it to start the right conversation, not to force a perfect answer.
